name: Data Register — Weekdays (String Array)
summary: Populate a dropdown with a reusable list of weekdays stored as a string-array data register in the Configuration Service
whenToUse: Dropdown where the user selects a day of the week
Simple string-array data register where label and value are the same
Demonstrating the simplest data register pattern
notes: The register data is a simple string array: ["Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday"]
For string arrays, each value is used as both the label and value in the dropdown
Set `enum: [""]` as a placeholder in the data schema — the actual values are loaded from the register at runtime
The `options.register.urn` points to a Configuration Service data-register definition
Use `dataRegisterListTool` to find existing registers and `dataRegisterCreateTool` to create new ones
